class Invoice:
    # Violation: a single domain class mixing parsing, business logic, database IO, and UI rendering
    def parse_json(self, raw_data):
        self.amount = raw_data["amt"]
        
    def calculate_tax(self):
        return self.amount * 0.2
        
    def save_to_db(self, connection):
        connection.execute(f"INSERT INTO invoices VALUES ({self.amount})")
        
    def render_html(self):
        return f"<h1>Invoice: {self.amount}</h1>"
